subject: South Supreme Kai, a stocky powerfully-built humanoid figure in a purple outfit, fists raised in a defiant combat stance
description: A stocky, powerfully built humanoid figure stands in a defiant combat stance with fists raised. The figure wears a purple outfit and has a stern, determined expression. Yellow and orange energy surges around the figure against a warm golden background. The body language is aggressive and resolute — this is a figure refusing to yield. The composition is close mid-shot with the figure filling much of the frame.
foreground: stocky humanoid figure in purple outfit, fists raised, energy aura surrounding them
emotion: defiant, fierce resistance, unyielding combat stance
